included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Mysore & Palace Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive in Mysore. Tour the magnificent Mysore Palace and watch the beautiful musical fountain and light show at Brindavan Gardens in the evening.

itinerary.title: Travel to Ooty & Blue Hills Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Drive up to the Nilgiri hills to Ooty. Visit the Ooty Botanical Gardens, take a peaceful boat ride on Ooty Lake, and enjoy the view from Doddabetta Peak.

title: Ooty & Mysore: Royal Heritage & Scenic Hills
description: Embark on a delightful short escape combining the royal history of Mysore and the misty charm of Ooty. Stroll through the majestic Mysore Palace and the colorful Brindavan Gardens, then climb into the Nilgiri hills to experience Ooty's quiet lakes and sprawling tea gardens.
highlights: Explore the magnificent Mysore Palace and its evening illuminations
Walk through the musical fountain paths of Brindavan Gardens
Enjoy a relaxing boat cruise on the scenic Ooty Lake
Visit the lush Botanical Gardens and Doddabetta Peak
